title: gladiolus equitans
intro: Gladiolus equitans, also known as the 'Catalan Zebra', is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Iridaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory and skin issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Gladiolus equitans include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and eczema, as well as possessing antiseptic properties to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus equitans include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
